title: distichlis spicata var. borealis
intro: Distichlis spicata var. borealis, also known as alkali grass or alkali sacaton, is a type of perennial grass native to the coastal regions of North America. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, which have been used to treat wounds, fever, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Distichlis spicata var. borealis include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce inflammation, and improve respiratory function. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or poultices, and are often used in traditional medicine to treat a variety of ailments.
